title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 305.050 - Laws of state to govern
text:
305.050.  Laws of state to govern. — All crimes, torts and other wrongs committed by or against an aeronaut or passenger while in flight over this state shall be governed by the laws of this state; and the question whether damage occasioned by or to an aircraft while in flight over this state constitutes a tort, crime or other wrong by or against the owner of such aircraft shall be determined by the laws of this state.
(RSMo 1939 § 15110) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 13909
